name: flowchart-basic
source:
flowchart TD
A[Start] --> B[End]

name: flowchart-subgraph-explicit-id
source:
flowchart TD
subgraph api[API Layer]
  A[Gateway] --> B[Service]
end

name: flowchart-invalid-edge
source:
flowchart TD
A -->

name: flowchart-invalid-subgraph-close
source:
flowchart TD
subgraph api[API]
  A --> B

name: state-basic
source:
stateDiagram-v2
[*] --> Idle
Idle --> [*]

name: state-invalid-direction
source:
stateDiagram-v2
direction RLX
[*] --> Idle

name: sequence-basic
source:
sequenceDiagram
participant Alice
participant Bob
Alice->>Bob: Hello

name: sequence-activation-and-alt
source:
sequenceDiagram
participant A
participant B
A->>B: Request
activate B
alt success
  B-->>A: Response
else failure
  B-->>A: Error
end
deactivate B

name: sequence-invalid-message
source:
sequenceDiagram
participant A
A->>

name: sequence-partial-after-valid-message
source:
sequenceDiagram
participant A
participant B
A->>B: Hello
A->>

name: class-basic
source:
classDiagram
class Animal
class Duck
Animal <|-- Duck

name: class-cardinality-generic
source:
classDiagram
class Repository~T~
class User
Repository~T~ "1" --> "*" User : stores

name: class-generic-multi-param
source:
classDiagram
class Map~K, V~
class Entry
Map~K, V~ --> Entry : stores

name: class-invalid-relation
source:
classDiagram
class User
User -> Account

name: er-basic
source:
erDiagram
CUSTOMER ||--o{ ORDER : places

name: er-field-metadata
er-field-references-table-only
er-field-dotted-reference
mindmap-basic
source:
mindmap
  Root
    Branch A
    Branch B

name: mindmap-wrapped-nodes
source:
mindmap
  root((Root))
    feature[[Child A]]
    decision{{Child B}}

name: mindmap-dotted-aliases
source:
mindmap
  platform.root((Root))
    platform.api[[Child A]]
    platform.branch(Child B)

name: journey-basic
source:
journey
title Checkout
section Happy
  Search: 5: User
  Buy: 3: User

name: journey-multiple-sections
source:
journey
title Incident Response
section Detect
  Alert fires: 5: SRE
section Resolve
  Mitigate: 3: SRE, Platform

name: journey-invalid-score
source:
journey
title Checkout
section Happy
  Search: User

name: journey-colon-rich-step
source:
journey
title Incident Response
section Alerts
  HTTP: 500 Error: 1: SRE: On-call
  Recover service: 4: API: Team

name: journey-support-escalation
source:
journey
title Support Escalation
section Intake
  Customer reports issue: 2: Support
  Triage severity: 3: Support
section Escalation
  Hand off to engineering: 4: Support, Engineering
  Confirm resolution: 5: Support

name: state-notes-and-control
source:
stateDiagram-v2
state FanOut <<fork>>
state FanIn <<join>>
[*] --> FanOut
FanOut --> Idle
Idle --> FanIn
note right of Idle: Waiting
FanIn --> [*]

name: architecture-official-basic
source:
architecture-beta
service api(server)[API]
service db(database)[Database]
api:R --> L:db

name: architecture-title-basic
source:
architecture-beta
title "Platform"
service api(server)[API]
service db(database)[Database]
api:R --> L:db

name: architecture-extension-labeled-edge
source:
architecture-beta
service api(server)[API]
service db(database)[Database]
api:R --> L:db : SQL

name: flowchart-inline-class
source:
flowchart TD
A[API]:::hot --> B[(DB)]
classDef hot fill:#f66,stroke:#333

name: flowchart-class-assignment-line
source:
flowchart TD
A[API]
B[(DB)]
classDef hot fill:#f66,stroke:#333
class A,B hot

name: flowchart-modern-annotation-dotted-ids
source:
flowchart TD
api.gateway@{ shape: rect, label: "API Gateway" } --> db.primary@{ shape: cyl, label: "Primary DB" }

name: flowchart-style-dotted-id
source:
flowchart TD
api.gateway[Gateway]
style api.gateway fill:#dff,stroke:#08c,color:#024

name: flowchart-nested-subgraphs
source:
flowchart TD
subgraph platform[Platform]
  subgraph api[API]
    gateway[Gateway] --> service[Service]
  end
end

name: flowchart-unexpected-end
source:
flowchart TD
A --> B
end

name: flowchart-auth-decision
source:
flowchart TD
user[User] --> gateway[API Gateway]
gateway --> auth{Authenticated?}
auth -->|Yes| app[Dashboard]
auth -->|No| login[Login]

name: state-composite-alias
source:
stateDiagram-v2
state "Working Set" as WorkingSet {
  [*] --> Busy
  Busy --> Idle
}
note left of WorkingSet: Parent note
Idle --> [*]

name: state-direction-lr
source:
stateDiagram-v2
direction LR
[*] --> Idle
Idle --> Running
Running --> [*]

name: state-composite-standalone-declarations
source:
stateDiagram-v2
state Working {
  state Busy
  state Idle
  Busy --> Idle
}
Idle --> [*]

name: sequence-par-and
source:
sequenceDiagram
participant A
participant B
participant C
par fast lane
  A->>B: Request
and slow lane
  A->>C: Request
end

name: sequence-note-inside-alt
source:
sequenceDiagram
participant A
participant B
alt success
  note over A, B: Shared context
  A->>B: Request
else failure
  B-->>A: Error
end

name: sequence-critical-option
source:
sequenceDiagram
participant A
participant B
critical primary path
  A->>B: Request
option fallback path
  B-->>A: Error
end

name: architecture-rich-node-kinds
source:
architecture-beta
person user[User]
container app(server)[App]
database_container data(database)[Data Store]
user:R --> L:app : HTTPS
app:R --> L:data : TCP:5432

name: architecture-nested-groups
source:
architecture-beta
group global[Global]
group prod(cloud)[Prod] in global
service api(server)[API] in prod

name: architecture-edge-tier
source:
architecture-beta
group edge[Edge]
service web(server)[Web] in edge
service api(server)[API]
service db(database)[Database]
web:R --> L:api : HTTPS:443
api:R --> L:db : TCP:5432

name: unsupported-gitgraph
source:
gitGraph
commit id: "A"

name: missing-header-flow-only
source: A --> B

name: flowchart-cycle-loop
source:
flowchart TD
A[Receive] --> B[Process]
B --> C[Verify]
C --> A

name: flowchart-self-loop
source:
flowchart TD
A[Retry Until Success] --> A
A --> B[Done]

name: flowchart-wide-branching
source:
flowchart TD
Root[Dispatcher] --> C1[Worker 1]
Root --> C2[Worker 2]
Root --> C3[Worker 3]
Root --> C4[Worker 4]
Root --> C5[Worker 5]
Root --> C6[Worker 6]

name: flowchart-quoted-special-chars
source:
flowchart TD
A["Hello, world!"] --> B["User & Auth"]
B --> C["Done."]

name: flowchart-edge-styles-mixed
source:
flowchart TD
A[Start] ==> B[Primary]
B --> C[Default]
C -.-> D[Async]
D --- E[Connector]

name: flowchart-parallel-edges
source:
flowchart TD
A[Client] -->|GET| B[Server]
A -->|POST| B

name: flowchart-direction-LR-with-classes
source:
flowchart LR
classDef hot fill:#fee2e2,stroke:#dc2626
A[Ingest]:::hot --> B[Transform]
B --> C[Sink]

name: flowchart-long-chain
source:
flowchart TD
A[Step 1] --> B[Step 2]
B --> C[Step 3]
C --> D[Step 4]
D --> E[Step 5]
E --> F[Step 6]
